str.authority: Traitement du Renseignement et Action contre les Circuits Financiers Clandestins (TRACFIN)
str.notes: Suspicious transaction declarations (déclarations de soupçon) must be filed as soon as possible. DASPs/CASPs are obliged entities under the Monetary and Financial Code (Code monétaire et financier). Filed via TRACFIN's ERMES platform.
